roa.docketEntryComment: Peremptory Challenge to a Judge MICHELLE TONG CCP 170.6
PEOPLE'S Declaration of Amilcar Ford in Support of Challenge (Code Civ. Proc., 170.6)
Court Orders Bench Warrant Permanently Stayed
PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING UNDER PC 1050 FILED

/CAL: DEJ PROG REPORT/X: OWES PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT AT TESLA OR EMPLOYMENT ELSEWHERE/X: OWES PROOF OF SCHOOL AND CLASSES/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHOULD BE GIVEN A FEE WAIVER FOR SCHOOL & CLASSES//DOPU: PROOF OF COMPLIANCE OF ALL CONDITIONS SHOWN TO COURT/

/CAL: DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/X: LUCERO HERRERA, ADVOCATE AT THE YOUNG WOMEN'SFREEDOM CENTER, APPEARS VIA ZOOM & CONFIRMS DEFENDANT IS ATTENDING PROGRAM& WILL START DV CLASSES/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PROOF OF DV CLASSES &EMPLOYMENT/CONT/DOPU: DEFENDANT IS EMPLOYED (PROVIDE PROOF)/

/CAL: DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/X: DEFENDANT IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE/DEF: NEEDS TOPROVIDE PROOF OF PRESENCE IN EMERGENGY ROOM, DOMESTIC VIOLENCE CLASSES, EMPLOYMENT & HOUSING/X: LUCERO HERRERA, REPRESENTATIVE FROM YOUNG WOMEN'S FREEDOM CENTER, PRESENT IN COURT TODAY & OFFERS SUPPORT TO PAY FOR 2 WEEKS OFSTREET TO WORK CLASSES/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO SAVE MONEY FROM NEWLY OBTAINEDEMPLOYMENT FOR PYAMENT OF CLASSES/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT AND DA ARE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT IS RELIEVED FROM ACM/OR/X:COURT ORDERS FOR DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ATTENDING THE YOUNG WOMEN'S FREEDOM CENTER/CONT/DOP/

15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTYPLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/X: DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4, AFELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 245 (A)(4):/MO GRTD/DEFT ADV RTS: 4/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/X: DEFENDANT IS PLACED ON DEJ FOR TWO YEARS UNDER THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS:/X: DEFENDANT MUST NOT SUFFER ANY NEW ARRESTS,//X: DEFENDNT MUST COMPLETE SELF DETERMINATION PLAN THROUGH YOUNG WOMAN'S FREEDOM CENTER,/X: DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE 52 WEEK ONLINE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM THROUGH STREET TO WORK CENTER,/X: DEFENDANT MUST MAINTAIN HOUSING AND EMPLOYMENT (WITH EXCEPTION FOR EMERGENCIES),/X: DEFENDANT MUST CONTINUEATTENDING SCHOOL TO COMPLETE HER GED AND WILL ENROLL IN AND PARTICIPATE INCOLLEGE-LEVEL CLASSES,/CONTD: DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF PROGRAM/FAVRPT/X:COURTS TENTATIVE IS TO TERMINATE ELECTRONICMONITORING AT THE NEXT COURT DATE WITH ANOTHER POSITIVE PROGRESS REPORT/CONTD:STATUS OF PROGRAMMING & STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/

/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL TO LAS ANGELES TO ATTEND A FUNERAL BETWEEN THE THE DATES OF 04-20-21 TO 04-24-21,  THE DEFENDANT MUST NOTIFY THE SF SHERIFF'S OFFICE PRIOR TO LEAVING AND WHEN SHE HAS RETURNED,/CONTD: STATUS OF PROGRAM/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/SA1:TIZEYAH OBRYANT/SA2:133 PEPPERTREE WAY, PITTSBURG, CA/NTW60/LDPX:01-29-21/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & POSSIBLE MODIFICATION OF CPO/DOP/
/CAL: DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROGRESS REPORT/CONT/DOPU: POSITIVE REPORT
/CAL: DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/CONT/DOPU: POSITIVE PROGRESS REPORT,/
/CAL: STATUS OF PROGRAM/FAVRPT/EMTERM/CONTD: STATUS OF POSSIBLE RESOLUTION/
/CAL: STATUS OF PROGRAM/CTORD: ACM MODIFIED TO 3 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE//CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHREARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/DOP/CTORD: DEFENDANT BE ALLOWED TO TRAVEL TO NAVADA BETWEEN JANUARY 13 AND JANUARY 16/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & POSSIBLE CPO MODIFICATION/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
